---
title: "Mitesh Kumar"
---

```{=html}
<!-- Interactive Canvas Background -->
<canvas id="neural-canvas"></canvas>

<main>
  
  <!-- Hero Section -->
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-content reveal">
      <p class="eyebrow">PORTFOLIO // 2026</p>
      <h1 class="mega-title">MITESH <span class="text-gradient">KUMAR</span></h1>
      <h2 class="sub-mega">DATA SCIENTIST & ML ENGINEER</h2>
      <div class="hero-description">
        <p>Specializing in <strong>Mathematical Optimization</strong>, <strong>Computer Vision</strong>, and <strong>Deep Learning</strong>. I architect robust AI pipelines and solve complex network systems at scale.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="action-buttons">
        <a href="#projects" class="btn-neo"><span>Explore Work</span></a>
        <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn-neo btn-outline"><span>View Resume</span></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Experience Section -->
  <section id="experience" class="section container reveal">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2 class="section-title">Experience</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="bento-grid">
      
      <div class="bento-item span-2">
        <div class="bento-header">
          <span class="bento-date">Dec 2025 – Present</span>
        </div>
        <h3 class="bento-title">Student Research Assistant <br><span style="font-weight:400; font-size:1.1rem; color:#8892b0;">University of Regensburg</span></h3>
        <div class="bento-text">
          <p>Machine Learning for Side-Channel Analysis. Reviewing deep learning-based side-channel attacks and investigating robustness of neural-network-based attacks under realistic measurement conditions.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bento-tags">
          <span class="bento-tag">Deep Learning</span>
          <span class="bento-tag">Security</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="bento-item span-2">
        <div class="bento-header">
          <span class="bento-date">May 2025 – Present</span>
        </div>
        <h3 class="bento-title">Student Research Assistant <br><span style="font-weight:400; font-size:1.1rem; color:#8892b0;">FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg</span></h3>
        <div class="bento-text">
          <p>Transregio 154: Engineered a bicriteria optimization model in Pyomo for gas networks. Scaled numerical experiments across HPC clusters using Slurm job arrays.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bento-tags">
          <span class="bento-tag">Pyomo</span>
          <span class="bento-tag">Gurobi</span>
          <span class="bento-tag">HPC</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Projects Section -->
  <section id="projects" class="section container reveal">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2 class="section-title">Featured Work</h2>
    </div>
    
    <div class="bento-grid">
      
      <!-- Project 1 -->
      <div class="bento-item span-2 row-2">
        <div class="bento-header">
          <span class="bento-date">Computer Vision</span>
        </div>
        <h3 class="bento-title" style="font-size: 2.2rem;">Open-Set Face Recognition & Robust Tracking</h3>
        <div class="bento-text" style="font-size: 1.1rem;">
          <p>Built a robust face recognition pipeline achieving 90% accuracy in open-set identification. Optimized efficiency with dynamic K-Means clustering and dual-stream FaceNet (ResNet50) for 128-dimensional embeddings.</p>
          <p>Integrated MTCNN for detection with Template Matching fallback tracker for identity continuity during occlusions.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bento-tags">
          <span class="bento-tag">FaceNet</span>
          <span class="bento-tag">MTCNN</span>
          <span class="bento-tag">ResNet50</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Project 2 -->
      <div class="bento-item span-2">
        <div class="bento-header">
          <span class="bento-date">Object Detection</span>
        </div>
        <h3 class="bento-title">Hierarchical Object Detection</h3>
        <div class="bento-text">
          <p>Engineered an object detection pipeline integrating multi-scale Selective Search, ResNet18 CNN, and Linear SVM. Achieved MABO of 0.74 via NMS.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bento-tags">
          <span class="bento-tag">SVM</span>
          <span class="bento-tag">CNN</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Project 3 -->
      <div class="bento-item span-1">
        <h3 class="bento-title" style="font-size: 1.3rem;">Computational Imaging</h3>
        <div class="bento-text" style="font-size: 0.9rem;">
          <p>Synthesized HDR images by reverse-engineering camera response functions and Bayer demosaicing.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Project 4 -->
      <div class="bento-item span-1">
        <h3 class="bento-title" style="font-size: 1.3rem;">3D Scene Perception</h3>
        <div class="bento-text" style="font-size: 0.9rem;">
          <p>Extracted 3D dimensions from noisy ToF sensor data using MLESAC plane-fitting.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Skills Section -->
  <section id="skills" class="section container reveal" style="padding-bottom: 12rem;">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2 class="section-title">Technical Arsenal</h2>
    </div>
    
    <div class="bento-grid">
      <div class="bento-item span-4" style="flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 2rem;">
        
        <div style="flex:1; min-width: 200px;">
          <h4 style="color:var(--accent-light); margin-top:0;">Languages</h4>
          <div class="bento-tags" style="margin-top: 1rem;">
            <span class="bento-tag">Python</span>
            <span class="bento-tag">SQL</span>
            <span class="bento-tag">C++</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="flex:1; min-width: 200px;">
          <h4 style="color:var(--accent-light); margin-top:0;">ML Frameworks</h4>
          <div class="bento-tags" style="margin-top: 1rem;">
            <span class="bento-tag">PyTorch</span>
            <span class="bento-tag">TensorFlow</span>
            <span class="bento-tag">Scikit-learn</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="flex:1; min-width: 200px;">
          <h4 style="color:var(--accent-light); margin-top:0;">Optimization</h4>
          <div class="bento-tags" style="margin-top: 1rem;">
            <span class="bento-tag">Pyomo</span>
            <span class="bento-tag">Gurobi</span>
            <span class="bento-tag">Pandas</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</main>

<script src="custom.js"></script>
```
